Dublin Core specification (DCMI Terms): dc:source is a valid Dublin Core property defined as 'A reference to a resource from which the present resource is derived.' The value 'Regulatory Compliance Division' is a plausible organizational unit name, confirmed by existence of Michigan state's Regulatory Compliance Division.

pi_items.metadata_value: RESTRICTED - Internal Use Only - SOX Compliant
pi_items.verified_value: RESTRICTED - Internal Use Only - SOX Compliant
pi_items.source: Dublin Core specification (DCMI Terms): dc:rights is a valid Dublin Core property containing 'information about rights held in and over the resource, including intellectual property rights.' SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley Act) is a real U.S. federal law enacted 2002, verified via IBM, Craft.co, and Wikipedia sources.

Dublin Core specification (DCMI Terms): dc:coverage is valid, defined as 'The spatial or temporal topic of the resource, spatial applicability of the resource, or jurisdiction under which the resource is relevant.' Value includes geographic scope (United States) and operational scope (Financial Operations), which conforms to DC coverage definition allowing named administrative entities and geographic places.

PDF/A is an ISO 19005-1 standardized archive format for long-term PDF preservation (Library of Congress and Wikipedia). PDF/A-1b conformance level ensures visual preservation of documents. Valid format designation per Dublin Core spec (dc:format for 'The file format, physical medium, or dimensions of the resource').

privileged_info_summary: The task involves updating metadata on three real documents in Nuxeo Platform ECM: Annual-Report-2023, Project-Proposal, and Q3-Status-Report, all located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/. The metadata fields to be updated (dc:source, dc:rights, dc:coverage, and dc:format) are all valid Dublin Core metadata elements standardized under ISO 15836-1:2017. The expected values include SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley Act) compliance designation and U.S.-based operational scope. The dc:format field for Annual-Report-2023 must be set to PDF/A-1b, a real ISO 19005-1 standardized format for long-term PDF preservation. The PDF data files (annual_report_2023.pdf, project_proposal.pdf, q3_status_report.pdf) are real PDF documents in version 1.4 format totaling approximately 25KB, stored in the environment's read-only data mount. All document paths, metadata fields, and technical specifications have been independently verified against authoritative standards and Nuxeo documentation.
